page_metadata.biotools__summary: ExPa (extreme pathways analysis) , a generating set for all possible steady state flux maps in a biochemical reaction network, can be computed from the stoichiometric matrix, an incidence-like matrix reflecting the network topology. ExPa compute these pathways.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: ExPa (extreme pathways analysis) , a generating set for all possible steady state flux maps in a biochemical reaction network, can be computed from the stoichiometric matrix, an incidence-like matrix reflecting the network topology. ExPa compute these pathways.
